key_insights.insight: When parents divorce, children often internalize the separation as their own failure.
key_insights.quote: That's what children feel.They feel it's their failure.There's something wrong with them.And that's not true, but that's how kids feel.

key_insights.insight: Comedic personas can be a way to engage and attract attention in politics.
key_insights.quote: One of the things I've tried to do in politics is to get people interested, and one of the things I'm trying to do in Unleashed, which is unquestionably a mixture, there's a lot of serious argument in it, but also I'm trying to tell the story in as readable a way as possible.

key_insights.insight: The UK has massive wasted potential due to an uneven distribution of opportunity.
key_insights.quote: There is ambition and energy and genius and talent probably completely evenly distributed throughout the UK population. And opportunity is not.

key_insights.insight: Infrastructure investment is crucial for leveling up and equalizing opportunity.
key_insights.quote: Infrastructure is crucial for leveling up, transport infrastructure is a great equalizer of opportunity, so things like HS2, Northern Powerhouse Rail, we should be going on with those, in my view.

key_insights.insight: Brexit provided the UK with regulatory freedom that enabled a faster vaccination rollout during the pandemic.
key_insights.quote: One reason we were able to vaccinate so fast is because we had regulatory freedom of exactly the kind… that I had advocated.

key_insights.insight: Blanket apologies can validate false allegations and do a disservice to those working hard.
key_insights.quote: My blanket apology looked as though I was validating and accepting all those criticisms.

actionable_advice.advice: To cope with emotional pain, immerse yourself in work to build self-esteem.
actionable_advice.how_to: Channel your energy into academic or professional pursuits to regain a sense of accomplishment and purpose.

actionable_advice.advice: When facing a public scandal, avoid issuing blanket apologies and wait for the facts to emerge before responding.
actionable_advice.how_to: Refrain from making broad statements or universal apologies that could validate false accusations. Investigate and address specific issues with targeted apologies once the facts are clear.

memorable_stories: David Cameron’s reaction to Boris Johnson’s decision to support leaving the EU, threatening to "fuck you up forever" but offering a top job if he stayed.
Boris Johnson being told about his parents' divorce as a child, and responding with, "So, why did you have us then?"
The anecdote of finding his child at the bottom of a swimming pool in Italy and the incredible service he received.
The story of accidentally tackling a child in Japan while playing rugby.
contrarian_claims: Lockdowns may not have been as effective as initially believed due to the natural progression of the virus.
Issuing a general apology for a scandal can validate false allegations.
It was better to leave the EU with no concrete plan because there was no democratic way to reform it from within.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - (EXCLUSIVE) Boris Johnson: "They Were Looking at Engineering The Virus" And The Government Tried To Bribe Me!
